title: Chennai Express
tmdbOverview: Rahul embarks on a journey to a small town in Tamil Nadu to fulfill the last wish of his grandfather: to have his ashes immersed in the Holy water of Rameshwaram. En route, he meets a woman hailing from a unique family down South. As they find love through this journey in the exuberant lands of South India, an unanticipated drive awaits them.
synopsis: Chennai Express (2013) is a romance, comedy and action film from India. It carries a 6.2 rating on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2010s and genre rankings. It carries a PG-13 certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
